data.title: Elizabeth Warren, Jeff Merkley Press Binance, UAE Firm Over $2B Deal Involving Trump Family Stablecoin
data.description:
U. S. Senators Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Jeff Merkley (D-OR) are requesting that investment firm MGX and crypto exchange Binance preserve documents and communications related to the use of the Trump-affiliated World Liberty Financial’s stablecoin, USD1, according to a June 11 letter
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/elizabeth-warren-jeff-merkley-request-binance-mgx-records/

data.description:
Ripple and the SEC have joined forces to file a motion in a Manhattan district court, hoping for a decision that will support the settlement agreement. This is an unexpected turn in the XRP case. The court has been asked by both sides to lift the injunction and release the money order. In the XRP case, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-and-ripple-file-motion-in-xrp-lawsuit/

data.description:

The case contrasts with ongoing lawsuits naming Tom Brady, Stephen Curry, Kevin O'Leary, and other high-profile promoters. The post Shaquille O’Neal Shells Out $1.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/shaquille-oneal-1-8m-ftx-settlement/

data.title: Jack Ma-backed Ant Group Eyes Stablecoin Permits in Asia and Europe
data.description:
The international division of Ant Group is on the verge of joining the regulated sector of stablecoins by applying for licenses in Hong Kong, Singapore, and Luxembourg. This project will facilitate the blockchain-powered treasury business and cross-border payment services of the firm, which is expanding its fintech connection beyond mainland China.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/12/jack-ma-backed-ant-group-eyes-stablecoin-permits-in-asia-and-europe/

data.title: Shopify partners with Coinbase and Stripe to promote USDC stablecoin payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to two announcements released on Thursday, Shopify has teamed up with Coinbase and Stripe to make it easier for merchants to accept payments in Circle's USDC stablecoin. Stripe said in a press release: "Shoppers will be able to use their favorite crypto wallet to pay with USDC on Base. By default, Stripe will allow merchants to receive stablecoin payments in their preferred local currency and deposit them into their bank accounts like any other payment they receive." Stripe said the service will be open to Shopify merchants in 34 countries. Stripe said that stablecoin payments have settled more than $94 billion in the past two years, during which time monthly payments have grown from less than $2 billion to more than $6.3 billion.

data.title: Trump: Powell is a "dummy" and a 200 basis point rate cut would save $600 billion a year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump said he does not intend to fire Federal Reserve Chairman Powell, but called him a "stupid" because he did not cut interest rates. Speaking at an event at the White House on Thursday, Trump said that a 200 basis point interest rate cut could save the United States $600 billion a year. "We are spending $600 billion a year just because a 'stupid' sits here and says 'I don't see enough reason to cut interest rates now,'" Trump said. Trump added that if inflation rises, he agrees with the Fed to raise interest rates, "but now that inflation is falling, I may have to do something."

data.title: SEC Delays Decision on Bitwise Dogecoin, Grayscale Hedera, and VanEck Avalanche ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has postponed its decision on the Bitwise Dogecoin ETF, Grayscale Hedera Trust and VanEck Avalanche ETF.

data.title: HOME Lifts Off After World’s Largest Crypto Exchange by Trading Volume Adds Support for Defi App
data.description:
The world’s largest crypto exchange platform by trading volume is abruptly adding support for one decentralized finance (DeFi) application (DApp), causing its native token to skyrocket. In a new announcement, Binance says it is adding support for DeFi App (HOME), a DApp that aims to simplify decentralized trading as well as make it more accessible.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/12/home-lifts-off-after-worlds-largest-crypto-exchange-by-trading-volume-adds-support-for-defi-app/

data.title: China-ECB Alliance Heralds Bold Yuan Push – Is Dollar Dominance at Risk?
data.description:
China and ECB chief Christine Lagarde have marked 50 years of EU-China ties by discussing joint approaches to monetary reform, cross-border capital stability, and strategies for expanding the yuan’s global role, including local-currency settlement and potential digital channels.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/china-ecb-alliance-heralds-bold-yuan-push-is-dollar-dominance-at-risk/

data.title: BlackRock’s BUIDL nears $3B, registers 3x increase in less than 90 days
data.description:
BlackRock’s USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) expanded by about $1 billion between March 26 and June 11, representing roughly half of the $2 billion growth of the tokenized US treasuries market in the period. According to rwa. xyz data, BUIDL’s size is $2. 89 billion as of June 11
source: https://cryptoslate.com/blackrocks-buidl-nears-3b-registers-3x-increase-in-less-than-90-days/
